name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Firewall Modified or Stopped
notes: This building block detects Cloud firewall modified or stopped.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Firewall Modified or Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud

when the event QID is one of the following (5001056) Success Audit: The Windows Firewall Service has been stopped, (5001064) Success Audit: The Windows Firewall Driver has been stopped, (105250841) Create or update a firewall rule., (105250829) Create or update a firewall rule., (105250235) Create or update server firewall rule that controls IP address range allowed to connect to the server, (105250238) MICROSOFT.SQL/SERVERS/MICROSOFT.SQL/SERVERS/FIREWALLRULES/WRITE, (105252998) Create/update Azure Firewall, (105253071) Create/update Firewall Policy, (105253070) Create/update Firewall Policy Rule Group, (105254639) Create/update firewall rule, (105254682) Create/update firewall rule, (105254727) Create/update firewall rule, (105254761) Create/update firewall rule, (105253884) Create/update web application firewall, (105253097) Create/update Web Application Firewall Policy, (105250840) Delete a firewall rule., (105250828) Delete a firewall rule., (105252996) Delete Azure Firewall, (105253065) Delete Firewall Policy, (105253068) Delete Firewall Policy Rule Group, (105254680) Delete firewall rule, (105254759) Delete firewall rule, (105254637) Delete firewall rule, (105254725) Delete firewall rule, (105250234) Delete firewall rule from the server, (105251713) Delete IP firewall rules, (105253882) Delete web application firewall, (105253095) Delete Web Application Firewall Policy, (105250180) DELETESERVERFIREWALLRULE, (105250249) UPDATESERVERFIREWALLRULE, (105250251) UPSERTSERVERFIREWALLRULE, (105253066) Join Firewall Policy
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cloud Firewall Modified or Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
